subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Master! Thou beholdest my powerlessness and my poverty, then my distress and my desperation, and Thou dost witness, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی و سیدی تری عجزی و افتقاری ثم ضری و اضطراری و تشهد یا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
